title: neoraputia alba
intro: Neoraputia alba is a species of flowering plant in the Rutaceae family, commonly known as the White Raputia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Neoraputia alba include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and combat infections, as well as its potential to treat conditions such as bronchitis and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Neoraputia alba can be used in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
